name: Box Breathing
subtitle: 4 in, 4 hold, 4 out, 4 hold for a calm reset.
guidanceText: Inhale for four, hold gently, exhale for four, hold softly. Stop if uncomfortable.

name: Equal Breathing
subtitle: Balanced inhale and exhale for steady attention.
guidanceText: Breathe in and out for the same count. Keep the breath quiet and unforced.

name: Extended Exhale
subtitle: Longer exhale to encourage a reflective pause.
guidanceText: Inhale naturally, then exhale slightly longer. Never strain the breath.

name: 4-6 Breathing
subtitle: Inhale four, exhale six for evening calm.
guidanceText: Let the exhale be smooth rather than dramatic.

name: Coherent Breathing
subtitle: Slow rhythmic breathing for centered focus.
guidanceText: Breathe at a comfortable slow rhythm with relaxed shoulders.

name: Morning Energizing Breath
subtitle: Gentle activation without intense retention.
guidanceText: Use clear nasal breaths and stop if dizzy.

name: Calming Evening Breath
subtitle: A softer rhythm for closing the day.
guidanceText: Exhale with ease and let the jaw unclench.

name: Three-Breath Reset
subtitle: A quick reset before a decision.
guidanceText: Take three deliberate breaths before choosing the next action.

name: Gratitude Breath
subtitle: Pair breath with one specific appreciation.
guidanceText: Name one real support in your life as you breathe.

name: Focus Breath
subtitle: A practical rhythm before deep work.
guidanceText: Breathe steadily and choose one task before opening your eyes.
